[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 90
- Description: Autopilot web browsing (Tavily) shipped + Telegram/beta-deploy roadmap
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/43
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/205
  
  Details:
  Two pieces of work this session, both merged and (for the code) deployed live:
  
  1) truesight_autopilot#43 — added web browsing to the chat agent via Tavily: web_search (ranked results + synthesized answer) and web_extract (cleaned page text), registered in the tool loop and system prompt. 7 unit tests pass; live Tavily smoke test confirmed search+extract. Reconciled local/prod .env divergence (restored prod-only Bugsnag keys) and deployed to the production EC2 autopilot via deploy.sh. Verified on prod: /health ok, 21 tools incl web_search/web_extract, TAVILY key loaded.
  
  2) agentic_ai_context#205 — tracked execution roadmap (per OPERATING_INSTRUCTIONS §5) for the autopilot Telegram interface + dapp beta/prod split (beta.dapp.truesight.me) + Tier-2 auto-merge-to-beta deploy loop, with preflight checklist and resume tracker.
  
  PRs: https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/43 , https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/205
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
